name: The Power of Doznath
short_description: Discover the mysteries around the secret thumb of Doznath.
detailed_description:
The ancient once said...

The ancient legends said that a great power was aprisioned in a dungeon, where only the bravest could venture and get out alive. Countless adventurers tried, but never returned to tell the story.

A Dungeon Full of Challenges

Explore a dungeon filled with challenges to overcome, where patience and agility are key traits for success.

Use Rings to Enhance Your Skills

Find rings as you explore the dungeon and equip the best ones for your playstyle, creating unique and personalized combat experiences for each player.

Distribute Points to Strengthen Yourself

Level up and earn points to improve your character by choosing attributes that can make you faster or more resistant to enemy attacks.

Eliminate Hundreds of Enemies

Face and defeat hundreds of enemies guarding the dungeon from intruders, using all the resources acquired during your exploration. But beware of the bosses you'll encounter...

Equip Weapons with Unique Abilities

Discover unique weapons while exploring and defeating bosses. Each weapon contains a distinctive set of abilities that makes combat truly one-of-a-kind.

The Power of Doznath is a 2D Action RPG where you can choose a class and progress your character, through a challenging dungeon, in order to find a great power once dormant.
